title: Automotive Oscilloscope Practice Trainer
description: Practise automotive waveform setup, triggering and component waveform interpretation.

title: Diagnostic Challenge Simulator
description: Choose tests, reveal evidence and identify the most likely vehicle fault.

title: Test — Don't Guess
description: Develop structured diagnostic decision-making by selecting the best next test.

title: Wiring Diagram Diagnostic Trainer
description: Read automotive wiring diagrams, follow current paths and locate circuit faults.

title: Electrical Circuit Simulator
description: Use a virtual multimeter to test automotive circuits and faults.

title: Relay Operation Simulator
description: Explore relay terminals, coil operation, contacts and circuit faults.

title: Voltage Drop Simulator
description: Learn correct voltage-drop testing across cables, connections and earth paths.

title: CAN Bus Fault Simulator
description: Investigate CAN High, CAN Low, termination resistance and network faults.

title: Automotive Alternator Simulator
description: Remove the casing and explore the rotor, stator, rectifier and regulator.

title: Smart Charging System Simulator
description: Explore how the ECU controls alternator output using battery state of charge, LIN communication and driving conditions.

title: Camshaft & Crankshaft Correlation Trainer
description: Compare camshaft and crankshaft waveforms and identify timing faults.

title: In-Cylinder Compression Simulator
description: Interpret in-cylinder pressure behaviour and engine mechanical condition.

title: Low-Pressure Fuel Pump Simulator
description: Explore fuel-pump current, pressure behaviour and common faults.

title: Brake Hydraulic Simulator
description: Follow hydraulic pressure through a braking system and investigate faults.

title: Wheel Alignment Simulator
description: Explore toe, camber and caster and complete alignment challenges.

title: Manual Gearbox Power Flow Simulator
description: Observe power flow, synchroniser movement and different gearbox designs.

title: Differential & Final Drive Simulator
description: Explore final-drive reduction, differential action and drivetrain faults.

title: Clutch Operation Simulator
description: Explore clutch operation, torque transfer, diaphragm spring movement, release bearing action and common clutch faults using a realistic cutaway animation.

title: Dual Mass Flywheel Simulator
description: Explore how a dual mass flywheel absorbs torsional vibration using a realistic front view and cutaway animation. Investigate wear, damping, arc spring operation and common DMF faults.
